case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. NOE EDGARDO CABRERA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $580.96 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, NOE EDGARDO CABRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, COURT COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NOE EDGARDO CABRERA RIVERA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, NOE EDGARDO CABRERA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, NOE EDGARDO CABRERA $580.96 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $665.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, NOE EDGARDO CABRERA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE; CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
